Tesseract trained models — Apache License 2.0
Source: https://github.com/tesseract-ocr/tessdata (and tessdata_fast)

Bundled in lang/:
- jpn.traineddata.gz       … Japanese, horizontal (tessdata / standard)
- jpn_vert.traineddata.gz  … Japanese, vertical  (tessdata / standard)
- eng.traineddata.gz       … English (tessdata_fast)

Trained models for Tesseract OCR, distributed by Google/community under Apache-2.0.
